headline: ASUS Launches Three New Desktop PCs at Best Buy, Led by the First Snapdragon-Powered All-in-One
summary: Two new all-in-one PCs arrive at Best Buy, including the world's first Snapdragon-powered AiO, delivering big screens, quiet performance, and plug-and-play simplicity Introducing the ASUS V400 AiO — a new generation all-in-one computer designed to elevate modern family living. Powered by the Snapdragon X platform, it blends whisper-quiet performance, advanced AI capabilities, and a beautiful minimal aesthetic into one remarkably slim form, redefining the modern family PC. Fremont, CA, April 16,
